subcodes.title: Words to Latimer, Esslemont, Randall et al, spoken on 1919-11-25
subcodes.first_line: The method of Bahá'u'lláh will be enforced and the House of Justice will not presume to change it. The purpose of Bahá'u'lláh's arrangement is that man is not to be interfered with in the leaving of his property.
